case_title: BURNS, ELIZABETH A. VS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNS, ELIZABETH A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $3,875.95 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,895.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
